documentation.description:
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  HAC - HAC Ada Compiler

  A compiler in Ada for an Ada subset

  Copyright, license, etc. : see top package.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  Builder: *the* entry point for building an executable (possibly for the p-code
  virtual machine) from Ada sources (a main procedure and possible depending units).

tagged_types.name: Build_Data

fields.name: CD
fields.description:
Main name hint is the upper-case Ada name of the main unit
as guessed from a file name.
This is used for circular unit dependency detection.
The name has to be known before the parsing of main unit's
context clause, and so, before the parsing of the name itself.

fields.name: LD
fields.description:
Main name hint is the upper-case Ada name of the main unit
as guessed from a file name.
This is used for circular unit dependency detection.
The name has to be known before the parsing of main unit's

fields.name: asm_dump
fields.description: Assembler output of compiled object code

fields.name: listing_file_name
fields.description: Listing of source code with details

parameters.description: We could have a shebang or other Ada sources before

generic_instantiations.name: String_Maps
generic_instantiations.code:
package String_Maps is new Ada.Containers.Hashed_Maps
  (Key_Type        => HAT.VString,
   Element_Type    => HAT.VString,
   Hash            => Ada.Strings.Unbounded.Hash,
   Equivalent_Keys => HAT."=",
   "="             => HAT."=");
